nasb.text: Ephraim is stricken, their root is dried up, They will bear no fruit. Even though they bear children, I will slay the precious ones of their womb.

esv.text: Ephraim is stricken; their root is dried up; they shall bear no fruit. Even though they give birth, I will put their beloved children to death.

cnv.text: 以法蓮被擊打，他們的根枯乾了， 必不能再結果子。 即使他們生產， 我必殺死他們所生的愛子。”

ccb.text: 以法莲要被击打， 他们的根将枯干， 再也不能结果。 就算他们能生儿育女， 我也要杀死他们心爱的孩子。”
